original_image_tags: A dark, typewritten document page with the word "RESTRICTED" stamped at the top and bottom. The text is white on a black background, characteristic of a photographic negative or a copy made on a reverse-process machine. There are three punched holes along the left margin. A handwritten page number "139" is in the bottom right corner.

elements.description: Two visible stamps or labels reading 'RESTRICTED' in large, slightly faded block letters, one at the top and one at the bottom of the page.

The entire page consists of typed body text describing a UAP sighting report involving Mrs. Hedstrom, Mr. Hedstrom, and police officers in Twin Falls. The text details groups of objects in triangular formations, estimated counts of 10, 3, 5 or 6, and 35 to 50, moving northeasterly and later southwesterly. The text contains some struck-through words.

judge.reason: Description A describes a photographic negative page with punched holes and handwritten number, while Description B describes a standard typed page with specific witness names and UAP details, indicating they are viewing completely different visual content.
